span.p:
recomputed every frame (30 Hz)
PointLight state (~9 values)
position: x, y, z
intensity: current_brightness
falloff: radius + scale sx,sy,sz + rotation
move_speed

span.p:
REACTION
──────────
~33 ms / 30 Hz · writes the light
mode: idle / flow / aware / engaged / crowd
gestures + dwell phases
the only loop that writes the light state

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ANTICIPATION
──────────
seconds → hours · sets the context
trends: 1 / 5 / 30 / 60 min windows
flow tracker: 30 s window
bias idle/flow · pre-position the light

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SELF-TUNING
──────────
hours → days · retunes the coefficients
meta-review 3x/day + daily learning · friction = interaction budget
───── 12 meta-parameters (the 'personality') ─────
responsiveness · energy · attention_span
sociability · exploration · memory
brightness_global · speed_global · pulse_global
follow_speed_global · dwell_influence · idle_trend_weight
